name: Bonbon Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out vanilla wafers with a rolling pin until fine and smooth.
2. Combine the rolled-out vanilla wafers with the remaining ingredients (except chocolate and shortening).
3. Form the mixture into small balls.
4. Dip each ball in melted chocolate chips, which have been melted over low heat using shortening.
5. Place the dipped cookies in the refrigerator to set overnight.
6. Serve cold.
